scripts.version:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && cd duedgusto && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && cd duedgusto && npm version minor --no-git-tag-version
scripts.version:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && cd duedgusto && npm version major --no-git-tag-version
